BOB DYLAN - 4 Tracks from Bonnaroo Festival June 11th 2004 SBD (JTT Capture)

BOB DYLAN
Bonnaroo Festival
Manchester, Tennessee
June 11th 2004

NOTE: This Torrent is a Capture from streaming audio so would be considered "Lossy",
though sound is Excellent.

SOURCE: Streaming Audio > Soundforge PRO 10b (Capture as .WAV Files) >
FLAC Level 6 Align on Sector Boundaries

1. SAMSON AND DELILAH
2. YOU WIN AGAIN
3. SING ME BACK HOME
4. PANCHO & LEFTY

JTT, November 2010
